ideas.title: Whispering Waves Lullaby
ideas.hook: Shhh, listen to the gentle whispers of the sea.
ideas.theme: Calming ocean sounds help soothe babies to sleep.

ideas.title: Soft Rainfall Lullaby
ideas.hook: Raindrops falling gently on our roof, it's time for rest.
ideas.theme: Soothing rain sounds help create a peaceful sleep environment.

ideas.title: Nighttime Forest Friends
ideas.hook: Join us on an adventure with the nighttime forest friends.
ideas.theme: Animals making soothing sounds to help babies sleep.

ideas.title: Starry Night Lullaby
ideas.hook: Look up at the stars twinkling in the night sky.
ideas.theme: A calming lullaby that incorporates the beauty of the night sky.

ideas.title: Lullaby of the Wind
ideas.hook: The wind is singing a gentle song just for you.
ideas.theme: Soothing wind sounds to help babies drift off to sleep.
